'''Lena Cobral''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who testified against her [[Cobral family|family]] so that she could overthrow their [[The Cobral|web]] of corruption on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Frego]]. Her testimony was sparked by the murder of her husband, [[Rutin Cobral]], at the hands of [[Solan Cobral]], [[Zanita Cobral]], and the rest of the family.

Lena summoned the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] for escort on her journey to testify in front of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. The Council dispatched [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], who assisted Lena in gathering the evidence she needed. However, a sudden betrayal by her mother-in-law, Zanita, nearly cost Lena her life. The attack was thwarted by Obi-Wan, who had grown infatuated with Lena since the start of the mission.

Lena's fate after testifying is unknown, though she did become a celebrated hero of Frego. Obi-Wan speculated that she would become a politician, but Lena insisted that she would travel away from Frego and live the rest of her life on a distant world.
